items.title: Tesla Stock Slides as OpenAI Targets Its Robotics Business
items.body: Tesla shares slipped on reports that OpenAI is moving into humanoid robotics, a business Tesla has championed with Optimus.

items.title: BYD Will Pay for Self-Driving Crashes — a Promise Tesla Never Made
items.body: BYD says it will fully cover at-fault accidents that occur while its urban self-driving system is active — a commitment Tesla has never made for FSD.

items.title: Model 3 Survives 300-Foot Malibu Cliff Fall — All Occupants Safe
items.body: Both occupants of a Tesla Model 3 survived a roughly 300-foot fall off a Malibu cliff, drawing fresh attention to the car's structural safety.

items.title: SpaceX–Tesla Merger Could Auto-Trigger Musk's $1T Pay Package
items.body: Ahead of a major SpaceX IPO, analysts say a SpaceX–Tesla merger could automatically trigger Elon Musk's trillion-dollar pay package.

items.title: Tesla's Dedicated Optimus Factory Breaks Ground at Giga Texas
items.body: A dedicated factory targeting up to ten million Optimus units a year is officially under construction at Gigafactory Texas.
